title: CosmicTextures
description: Hundreds of custom item textures to improve QOL and overall gameplay experience on CosmicPrisons and CosmicSky.
body:
# 🖼️ What is CosmicTextures?
CosmicTextures is a texture pack mod that was created by the [Minecoin](https://discord.gg/minecoin) team for the servers, CosmicPrisons & CosmicSky.

This mod serves as a standalone utility mod that displays custom textures for hundreds of in-game items and models. This mod detects various in-game states and item conditions, and it displays custom textures based on these conditions.

Credit to Momica for sourcing many of the textures used in this mod.

## ✅ Showcase
